name: Record Book Rewritten: World Cup 2026 Milestone Week
angle: The opening round of WC2026 rewrote the record book: Messi's first World Cup hat-trick drew him level with Klose's all-time scoring record at a record sixth tournament, while Mbappe, Kane, Haaland and debutants Cape Verde all left their mark.

questions.question: Lionel Messi opened his sixth World Cup with his first-ever hat-trick at the tournament. Which side did Argentina beat 3-0 to begin their title defence?
Argentina arrived in 2026 as defending champions. Where did they lift the trophy in 2022?
Kylian Mbappe became which nation's all-time leading scorer during their opening 3-1 win over Senegal?
Messi's treble carried him to 16 World Cup goals, level with the tournament's all-time leading scorer. Who holds that record alongside him?
Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo share a new distinction in 2026. They are the first players ever to do what?

options.A: Appear at six different World Cups
options.B: Score at six different World Cups
options.C: Captain a side at six World Cups

questions.question: Mbappe's double against Senegal took him past Olivier Giroud at the top of France's scoring chart. What was his new national tally?
Erling Haaland scored twice on his long-awaited World Cup debut in a 4-1 Norway win. Who were the opponents, themselves back on the biggest stage after a 40-year wait?
The shock of the opening round saw World Cup debutants Cape Verde hold a heavyweight to a goalless draw. Which reigning European champions did they frustrate?
England began with a chaotic 4-2 win over Croatia. Who scored twice for the Three Lions, including an early penalty?
Ronaldo's sixth World Cup opened with a frustrating 1-1 draw. Which side earned their first-ever World Cup point against Portugal?
By starting against DR Congo at 41 years old, Ronaldo set which World Cup record?

options.A: Oldest outfield player to start a World Cup match
options.B: Oldest goalscorer in World Cup history
options.C: Oldest captain at a World Cup
options.D: Oldest player ever to appear at a World Cup

questions.question: Harry Kane's opener against Croatia was his 10th World Cup goal, drawing him level with England's tournament record holder. Who is that?
Mbappe broke the France record in spectacular fashion against Senegal. How did the milestone goal arrive?

options.A: A long-range strike deep in stoppage time

questions.question: Cape Verde's clean sheet against Spain owed much to a veteran goalkeeper who made a string of saves. Roughly how old is their hero, Vozinha?
Jude Bellingham's strike against Croatia made him only the third man to score at two different World Cups before turning 23. Which two legends were already in that group?

sources: https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/6/17/lionel-messi-rewrites-history-books-at-record-sixth-world-cup (Messi hat-trick v Algeria, Argentina 3-0 in Kansas City; reaches 16 WC goals to equal Klose; first player to appear at six World Cups)

https://www.skysports.com/football/news/world-cup/kylian-mbappe-france-all-time-top-scorer (Mbappe brace v Senegal in 3-1 win; reaches 58 to pass Giroud as France's all-time top scorer; record-breaker a long-range strike in stoppage time)

https://www.skysports.com/football/news/13552715/world-cup-2026-iraq-1-4-norway-erling-haaland-scores-twice-on-tournament-debut-as-stale-solbakkens-side-make-winning-start (Haaland double on WC debut; Norway 4-1 Iraq; Iraq back after 40-year absence)
https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49074414/spain-world-cup-shock-draw-cape-verde-lamine-yamal (Spain 0-0 Cape Verde; European champions held by debutants)

https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49071783/spain-cape-verde-live-world-cup-2026-latest-updates-commentary-score-result (40-year-old keeper Vozinha makes seven saves; Cape Verde's historic debut point)
https://www.cbssports.com/soccer/news/england-vs-croatia-live-updates-world-cup-2026-score-result/live/ (England 4-2 Croatia; Kane brace incl. 12th-min penalty, Bellingham and Rashford also score)
https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/6/17/portugal-held-to-1-1-draw-by-dr-congo-in-their-world-cup-2026-opener (Portugal 1-1 DR Congo; Congo's first WC point; Ronaldo equals Messi on six World Cups)

https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49101842/fifa-world-cup-2026-stats-cristiano-ronaldo-0-10-record-41-ivan-perisic-equal-lionel-messi-jude-bellingham-join-pele-michael-owen (Ronaldo at 41y123d oldest outfield player to start a WC game; Kane's 10th WC goal ties Lineker; Bellingham 3rd to score at two WCs before 23, joining Pele and Owen)
